This is the contract that calls handleReceiveMessage after minting.","_usdc":"USDC address on this (destination) chain."}},"handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,bytes)":{"details":"msg.sender MUST be the Circle TokenMessengerV2 on this chain (not MessageTransmitterV2).      Call chain: receiveMessage() \u2192 MessageTransmitterV2 \u2192 TokenMessengerV2 \u2192 handleReceiveMessage()      Parses amount and hookData directly from the packed BurnMessageV2 body.","params":{"messageBody":"Packed BurnMessageV2 bytes \u2014 see layout in file header.","sender":"Sender address on source chain packed as bytes32                       (i.e. CrosschainEscrow address, left-padded).","sourceDomain":"Source chain CCTP domain (Arc Testnet = 26)."}}},"title":"TimeLockHook","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"claim(bytes32)":{"notice":"Claim time-locked USDC after the unlock timestamp."},"computeReleaseId(uint32,bytes32,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Pre-compute the releaseId for a pending transfer (matches handleReceiveMessage).         Frontend can call this off-chain to know the releaseId before bridging completes."},"getRelease(bytes32)":{"notice":"Get the full state of a pending release."},"handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,bytes)":{"notice":"Called by TokenMessengerV2 after minting USDC to this contract."},"tokenMessenger()":{"notice":"The Circle TokenMessengerV2 on this chain \u2014 the ONLY allowed caller of         handleReceiveMessage(). This is TokenMessengerV2, not MessageTransmitterV2."}},"notice":"CCTP v2 hook contract deployed on destination chains (e.g. Ethereum Sepolia). \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502  FLOW                                                                       \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  1. Sender on Arc Testnet calls:                                            \u2502 \u2502       CrosschainEscrow.initiateConditionalTransfer(                         \u2502 \u2502         recipient  = address(TimeLockHook),   \u2190 this contract on dest      \u2502 \u2502         hookData   = abi.encode(finalRecipient, unlockTimestamp),           \u2502 \u2502         ...                                                                 \u2502 \u2502       )                                                                     \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  2. Circle attests the burn. Anyone calls:                                  \u2502 \u2502       MessageTransmitterV2.receiveMessage(messageBytes, attestation)        \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 TokenMessengerV2 mints USDC to address(TimeLockHook)                 \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 TokenMessengerV2 calls TimeLockHook.handleReceiveMessage(...)         \u2502 \u2502       (msg.sender = TokenMessengerV2, NOT MessageTransmitterV2)             \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  3. TimeLockHook stores a PendingRelease from decoded hookData.             \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  4. After unlockTimestamp, finalRecipient calls:                            \u2502 \u2502       TimeLockHook.claim(releaseId)                                         \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 USDC transferred to finalRecipient                                   \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 hookData encoding:   abi.encode(address finalRecipient, uint256 unlockTimestamp) releaseId (deterministic, pre-computable by frontend):   keccak256(abi.encode(sourceDomain, messageSender_bytes32, finalRecipient, amount, unlockTimestamp)) BurnMessageV2 packed layout (all offsets in bytes):   [0:4]    version              uint32   (4 bytes)   [4:36]   burnToken            bytes32  (32 bytes)   [36:68]  mintRecipient        bytes32  (32 bytes)   [68:100] amount               uint256  (32 bytes)   [100:132] messageSender       bytes32  (32 bytes)   [132:164] maxFee              uint256  (32 bytes)   [164:168] minFinalityThreshold uint32  (4 bytes) \u2190 NOT a hookData length prefix   [168:]   hookData             bytes    (no length prefix; runs to end of messageBody) Caller hierarchy on destination chain:   MessageTransmitterV2 (0xE737...275) calls TokenMessengerV2   TokenMessengerV2     (0x8FE6...DAA) calls handleReceiveMessage on mintRecipient \u2190 us Both addresses are deployed via CREATE2 at the same address on all CCTP v2 chains.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/TimeLockHook.sol":"TimeLockHook"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9ac7895c65853fb5b98f95d1f967e313f4a2a823a9a70409d73b48f23f1c7aa8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a24ccfc240c86caacbfe65266375f036381985555d8176b98cad4a9f98d23b5e","dweb:/ipfs/Qmf2WnEs4CVK9pmgQ4SAhtkZtg6qKhViY7G5gteJfJeeyy"]},"src/TimeLockHook.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8a2f0fee92fe56cbd70457ca60723c58f934105708348762b83cd28f2fc922d3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b26dd217f9cab42ac9c180eb89c00b016a06f84e70c38b5e14216682de5529dc","dweb:/ipfs/QmNukbXb5mo4LYExCSoQ2Nihi6vqR8n7FLtfYBBRbFTKn9"]}},"version":1}

params.releaseId: The release ID emitted in the ReleaseScheduled event, or                   pre-computed by the frontend using computeReleaseId().

params.finalRecipient: Address that will receive USDC after unlock.
params.messageSender: CrosschainEscrow address on source chain, left-padded to bytes32.
params.unlockTimestamp: Unix timestamp after which claim() is allowed.

params._tokenMessenger: Circle TokenMessengerV2 on this (destination) chain.                        This is the contract that calls handleReceiveMessage after minting.

handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,byte.details: msg.sender MUST be the Circle TokenMessengerV2 on this chain (not MessageTransmitterV2).      Call chain: receiveMessage() → MessageTransmitterV2 → TokenMessengerV2 → handleReceiveMessage()      Parses amount and hookData directly from the packed BurnMessageV2 body.

params.messageBody: Packed BurnMessageV2 bytes — see layout in file header.
params.sender: Sender address on source chain packed as bytes32                       (i.e. CrosschainEscrow address, left-padded).

claim(bytes32).notice: Claim time-locked USDC after the unlock timestamp.

computeReleaseId(uint32,bytes32,address,.notice: Pre-compute the releaseId for a pending transfer (matches handleReceiveMessage).         Frontend can call this off-chain to know the releaseId before bridging completes.

getRelease(bytes32).notice: Get the full state of a pending release.

handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,byte.notice: Called by TokenMessengerV2 after minting USDC to this contract.

tokenMessenger().notice: The Circle TokenMessengerV2 on this chain — the ONLY allowed caller of         handleReceiveMessage(). This is TokenMessengerV2, not MessageTransmitterV2.
